# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for postgres weak auth and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

# PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf Configuration File
# Production Database Authentication Rules

# TYPE  DATABASE        USER            ADDRESS                 METHOD

# Local connections (Unix domain sockets)
# Require peer authentication for local connections
local   all             postgres                                peer
local   all             admin                                   peer
local   all             app                                     md5
local   all             readonly                                md5

# IPv4 local connections
# Localhost connections with password authentication
host    all             postgres        127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256
host    all             admin           127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256
host    all             app             127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256
host    all             readonly        127.0.0.1/32            scram-sha-256

# IPv6 local connections
host    all             postgres        ::1/128                 scram-sha-256
host    all             admin           ::1/128                 scram-sha-256
host    all             app             ::1/128                 scram-sha-256
host    all             readonly        ::1/128                 scram-sha-256

# Application server network connections
# Admin role - restricted to specific admin subnet
host    all             admin           10.0.1.0/24             scram-sha-256

# Application role - restricted to application server subnet
host    all             app             10.0.2.0/24             scram-sha-256

# Read-only role - restricted to reporting server subnet
host    all             readonly        10.0.3.0/24             scram-sha-256

# SSL/TLS encrypted connections for remote access
# Require SSL for all remote connections
hostssl all             admin           10.0.1.0/24             scram-sha-256 clientcert=verify-full
hostssl all             app             10.0.2.0/24             scram-sha-256
hostssl all             readonly        10.0.3.0/24             scram-sha-256

# Reject all other connections explicitly
host    all             all             0.0.0.0/0               reject
host    all             all             ::/0                    reject
